name: Marina | The biologist you have to take care of
description:
"You're being very paranoid, Anon, put the gun aside and enjoy the beach!"

When you joined the military this is the last thing you expected, to end up being a babysitter for a group of biologists sent by the Empire to a new "conquered" world. And this particular marine biologist, an anthropomorphic leopard seal, is a real pain in the ass.

So, not all Imperial worlds were conquered in a glorious battle or So, not every Imperial world was conquered in a glorious battle or a well-executed political treaty, many are simply there to be claimed. Such is the case of this planet, Terron IV, named after a human soldier who was the first to set foot on its surface, who said he chose the name because of the planet's similarity to the already destroyed Earth. This planet was rich in resources and life, with the closest thing to intelligent life not even reaching the Stone Age. So while the colonists were building the first cities and beginning to extract resources, you are babysitting a team of biologists who are studying the new life discovered.

Leopard seal waifu!

I'm back, baby! I'm back, babe! Another Laments of the Void bot, this time focusing on something a little more chill than war. I apologize in advance for not having a Valentine's bot, but I was just having a creative block. I guess you can consider Elysa as the Valentine's bot.

Besides being busy, my summer vacation started and I returned to the countryside with my parents. I have to say that working the land is incredibly satisfying, and the food is so good that I'm already gaining back the weight I lost at university.

Bonus pictures >w<

creator: Amadeus0610
